name: Fresh Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 large ripe tomatoes, seeded and cut into 1/2-inch dice
1/2 cup sliced scallions, or to taste
2 small pickled or fresh Jalapeno peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the ingredients in a bowl.
2. Season with salt to taste.
3. Transfer the mixture to a jar and store it in the refrigerator for up to one week.
